Our Story

A Legacy of Beauty

✦

Nestled in the heart of Sarasota, Nails 41 has been the destination of choice for those who demand nothing short of excellence. Our master technicians bring decades of combined expertise, treating every client as a work of art deserving the finest care.

"Every nail tells a story — let ours be one of artistry, care, and timeless elegance."

We believe beauty is a ritual — a moment of grace in an otherwise hurried world. Our salon is built on trust, craftsmanship, and a genuine love for making you feel radiant.

15+
Years
10K+
Clients
5 ★
Rated

Only the finest professional brands — safe, vibrant, long-lasting.
